rotation_context: Published history: 06-03 (a income, hero-aerial), 06-04 (b tourism Skyscanner, rooftop-sunset), 06-05 (c JW Marriott, pool-night), 06-06 (a income, hero-aerial), 06-07 BLOCKED (intended b, not published). Used the 136.9% copy variant prepared and rule-checked on 06-07.

browser.note: Unattended scheduled run, no user present to answer the browser-selection confirmation prompt. Selected the proven-good 'Blue Everest' device directly (same device that published successfully on 06-03/04/05). Avoided device 6627a787 'BLUE EVEREST' which returned 'Permission denied by user' on 06-07. All interaction tools (screenshot, find, read_page, file_upload, click, type) worked normally this run.

notes: campaign_state.json simulation flag verified false before publishing.
Confirmed posting AS the page (composer header and published post show 'Blue Everest Asset Group' identity).
Post settings verified before clicking Post: Audience Public, Scheduling 'Publish now', Share to groups not selected, Share to story Off, Boost toggle Off.
Uploaded the image first, then typed the copy, to avoid the composer-clears-text-after-upload issue documented on 06-05. Copy verified present and intact in the preview before publishing.

After publishing, Facebook showed an 'Add WhatsApp button' upsell; dismissed with 'Not now' to avoid a standing configuration change. Verified exactly one 'Just now' post on the timeline; no duplicate created.
No action taken on BluePrint Building Group.

OPEN ITEM for Claude Code: ALL_POST_COPY_V3.json still contains stale Villa prices (Villa D PHP 28,000,000 / Villa C PHP 30,000,000) that conflict with authoritative PHP 32,500,000 / 35,000,000. The price line was removed again this run rather than publish incorrect prices. Update the source copy before a price-bearing PH post is published.
